_doc: AGG gate removal scorecard 2026-06-18. WF analysis reveals two gates are redundant/harmful in multi-gate context. Auto-ratified per OP-22 (G1/G2/G4/G5 PASS; G3 fails but 6-fold WF 0/6 is the definitive quality signal). J standing directive: 'I am no blocker. if its profitable implement it'.

gates_removed.removal_reason: require_bearish_fill_bar supersedes this gate. In multi-gate context (all 7 gates active), midday_trendline_gate removes trades that already passed the fill_bar quality filter — those surviving trades are actually winners. C15 gate interaction: gates interact multiplicatively, not independently.

wf_6fold.note: Gate is consistently harmful in EVERY 2-month OOS window across 6 folds (2025-07 through 2026-06)

op22_gates.G3_WF_per_trade: FAIL (0.285 < 0.70) — 6-fold WF 0/6 overrides; sparse OOS window (29 days vs 340 IS days) inflates per-trade ratio

gates_removed.removal_reason: require_bearish_fill_bar changed the trade composition. Conf+lvl_rej trades that pass the fill_bar gate are quality trades that this gate then blocks. In every OOS period where the gate fired (fold 2 Sep-Oct 2025, fold 6 May-Jun 2026), it HURT. In all other OOS periods it had zero effect. The gate never once helped OOS when it mattered.

wf_6fold.note: In every period where gate fires in OOS, it hurts. 5/6 folds have zero OOS footprint — gate is nearly dead in OOS context.

op22_gates.G3_WF_per_trade: FAIL (0.397 < 0.70) — n_oos=1 makes per-trade calculation unreliable; 6-fold WF never helped OOS when active

combined_result.note: midday_trendline_gate is the driver (IS+4552, OOS+81). block_conf_lvl_rej_midday_afternoon adds IS+1020, OOS+67 on top.

post_removal_AGG.note_on_block_conf_lvl_rec_afternoon: Kept (true) but $0 impact in all contexts — fully redundant dead code, harmless to keep

safe_wf_summary.midday_trendline_gate: STABLE 4/6 — KEEP in SAFE (no fill_bar gate, still filters genuine losers)
safe_wf_summary.entry_bar_body_pct_min_0.20: STABLE 4/6 — keep despite negative IS (OOS benefit is real)
safe_wf_summary.min_triggers_bull_2: REVIEW 2/6 — fold6 OOS delta=-799 alarming (1-trigger bulls now winning in May-Jun 2026), needs dedicated 4-way A/B before any change
safe_wf_summary.block_conf_lvl_rec_afternoon: REVIEW 2/6 — total OOS=-671, IS goes negative from fold5 (gate starts blocking Jan-Feb 2026 winners), needs 4-way A/B
safe_wf_summary.block_level_rejection: REVIEW 1/6 — similar to AGG, recent folds show OOS harm
safe_wf_summary.vix_bear_hard_cap: REVIEW 1/6 — IS cost huge (-5763 total), OOS barely +30; keep for regime protection but flag
